text: I have RNA-seq data from biofilm and planktonic samples. Can you figure out which genes increase in biofilm using Galaxy?
Use Galaxy to perform differential expression between biofilm and planktonic RNA-seq samples and return a ranked gene table with effect sizes and p-values.
In Galaxy, align the reads, generate gene-level counts, run DESeq2 for biofilm versus planktonic samples, and return a CSV with gene_id, log2_fold_change, p_value, and adjusted_p_value.
